# Global Funds Open for Subscription - February 2026

### International Equity Funds You Can Invest In Today

Feb 04, 2026

2

Share

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!VqJg!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff45db489-94de-4600-ba14-cddbc694dce1_636x639.png)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!lFHK!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Faeb1d495-f3f9-4975-a7c4-cb76abed7259_633x740.png)

**Source:** BSE, MFI Explorer, Data as of 03-Feb-2026

**Purchase Limits:**

* Edelweiss International Schemes: Rs. 1,00,000 per PAN per month
* ICICI Prudential International Schemes: Rs. 2,00,000 per PAN per month
* Aditya Birla Sun Life International Schemes: Rs 1,00,00,000 per PAN per month
* Baroda BNP Paribas Aqua Fund of Fund: Rs 5,00,000 per PAN per month

International diversification can help protect & grow your portfolio in 2026.

**Fund details and Performance over the years** 👉 <https://www.assetplus.in/mfd/SatishVK>

**  
Disclaimer:** Mutual Fund investments are subject to market risks; read all scheme-related documents carefully.
